security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:5000; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://127.0.0.1:5000; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://127.0.0.1:5000 https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:5000; img-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:5000 data:; frame-ancestors 'none'
